name_en: Shipping Large Size OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Vintage Have you seen this? | Who doesn't love Black Silver!!🍋🍋 Lazy style Black Silver hobo hits my aesthetic! Silver side bar, zip double C pendant, embossed logo, love every detail ahhh! Casual yet high-end look. Handheld or underarm or clutch. Soft, supple leather with great texture, maximum lazy vibes!! I suggest everyone get one! Love brain at peak, can't control this silver bar hobo. Glossy Large Size Shoulder Crossbody Bag. Low-key, lazy, casual. This series is too hot. Shoulder or underarm use, crossbody carry. Beauty and practicality combined. Really practical for going out! Size: Large 40*30*15
